primaryFrame: Low back pain presentation with improving symptoms but persistent lifting-related functional limitation.

stateSummary.condition: Mechanical low back pain presentation without current red flag pattern
stateSummary.keyImpairment: Pain with flexion and reduced trunk endurance
stateSummary.keyFunctionalLimit: Difficulty lifting objects over 10 kg from floor level
stateSummary.trajectory: Early trend is improving but not yet functionally resolved

focusAreas: Track lifting tolerance over the next review window
Compare symptom improvement against work-task tolerance
planningGuardrails: Do not treat lower pain alone as full recovery if lifting tolerance remains limited
Keep risk review active while fear avoidance is still present
Reassess function and participation together rather than in isolation
missingOrNextQuestions: How much load can the patient currently tolerate without symptom flare?
Has bending confidence changed since the last visit?
Are modified duties still required across the full work shift?
notes: This example shows a decision-ready interpretation layer derived from structured patient state. It is not a diagnosis or treatment recommendation.
